glosses.ro: a trezi; a se pune de acord

sentences.target: Mi hermana y yo acordamos la hora.
sentences.reading: /mi eɾˈmana i ʝo a.korˈðamos la ˈoɾa/

translations.es: Mi hermana y yo acordamos la hora.
translations.ipa: /mi eɾˈmana i ʝo a.korˈðamos la ˈoɾa/
translations.en: My sister and I agreed on the time.
translations.fr: Ma sœur et moi avons convenu de l'heure.
translations.de: Meine Schwester und ich haben uns auf die Uhrzeit geeinigt.
translations.it: Mia sorella e io abbiamo concordato l'ora.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹和我商定了时间。
translations.ru: Мы с сестрой договорились о времени.
translations.pt: Minha irmã e eu concordamos com o horário.
translations.vi: Tôi và em gái đã thống nhất về thời gian.
translations.nl: Mijn zus en ik hebben de tijd afgesproken.
translations.uk: Ми з сестрою домовилися про час.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन और मैंने समय तय कर लिया।
translations.pl: Moja siostra i ja uzgodniliśmy godzinę.
translations.el: Η αδερφή μου κι εγώ συμφωνήσαμε την ώρα.
translations.nb: Søsteren min og jeg ble enige om tidspunktet.
translations.id: Adik perempuan saya dan saya sudah sepakat tentang waktunya.
translations.sv: Min syster och jag kom överens om tiden.
translations.ro: Sora mea și cu mine am convenit ora.
translations.cs: Moje sestra a já jsme se dohodli na čase.
translations.da: Min søster og jeg blev enige om tidspunktet.
translations.ja: 妹と私は時間を決めた。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying a noun; agrees in person/number with the possessor, not with the noun.
Common noun, feminine singular, functioning as part of the subject.
Coordinating conjunction linking two coordinated subjects.
Personal pronoun, first person singular, acting as part of the subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, first person plural; main predicate.
Definite article modifying the noun that follows; feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine singular, direct object/complement of the verb.

translations.en: They agree to go to the movies.
translations.fr: Ils ont décidé d'aller au cinéma.
translations.de: Sie haben beschlossen, ins Kino zu gehen.
translations.it: Hanno deciso di andare al cinema.
translations.pt: Eles combinaram de ir ao cinema.
translations.vi: Họ đồng ý đi xem phim.
translations.nl: Ze hebben afgesproken naar de bioscoop te gaan.
translations.hi: उन्होंने सिनेमा जाने का फैसला किया।
translations.nb: De ble enige om å gå på kino.
translations.id: Mereka sepakat untuk pergi ke bioskop.
translations.sv: De bestämde sig för att gå på bio.
translations.ro: Au convenit să meargă la cinema.
translations.cs: Dohodli se, že půjdou do kina.
translations.da: De blev enige om at gå i biografen.
translations.ja: 彼らは映画館に行くことにした。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, third person plural, functioning as subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, third person plural; main predicate.
Non-finite verb in infinitive form, complement of the previous verb.
Contraction of the preposition 'a' plus the article 'el'; introduces a prepositional complement.
Common noun, masculine singular, object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Yo acuerdo la hora con Ana.

translations.es: Yo acuerdo la hora con Ana.
translations.en: I set the time with Ana.
translations.de: Ich mache die Uhrzeit mit Ana aus.
translations.pt: Eu marco a hora com Ana.
translations.he: אני קובע את השעה עם אנה.
translations.nl: Ik spreek de tijd met Ana af.
translations.uk: Я домовляюся про час з Аною.
translations.hi: मैं आना के साथ समय तय करता हूँ।
translations.el: Κανονίζω την ώρα με την Άνα.
translations.ja: 私はアナと時間を決める。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, first person singular, functioning as subject.
Finite verb, present indicative, first person singular; main predicate.
Definite article modifying the noun that follows; feminine singular.
Common noun, feminine singular, direct object/complement of the verb.
Preposition introducing a prepositional complement.
Proper noun, functioning as object of the preposition.

sentences.target: Ella acuerda la fecha con Luis.

translations.es: Ella acuerda la fecha con Luis.
translations.en: She arranges the date with Luis.
translations.fr: Elle fixe la date avec Luis.
translations.de: Sie macht das Datum mit Luis aus.
translations.it: Lei fissa la data con Luis.
translations.zh-Hans: 她和路易斯约定了日期。
translations.pt: Ela combina a data com Luis.
translations.he: היא קובעת את התאריך עם לואיס.
translations.vi: Cô ấy sắp xếp ngày với Luis.
translations.nl: Zij spreekt de datum met Luis af.
translations.uk: Вона домовляється про дату з Луїсом.
translations.hi: वह लुइस के साथ तारीख तय करती है।
translations.el: Κανονίζει την ημερομηνία με τον Λουίς.
translations.ja: 彼女はルイスと日付を決める。
